topics: Introduction to user research and its importance in interface design
exploring user motivations and behaviour patterns-Analysing common user behaviours - safe exploration
and streamlined repetition. Introduction to Bootstrap 5-layout structures- grid system
Introduction to information architecture and application structure -Exploring patterns for feature organization
and browsing. Organizing content in Bootstrap 5- images
and tables. Introduction to navigation design and signposts - Navigational models
and breadcrumbs. Bootstrap 5's navigation components- navbar
Introduction to page layout principles and visual frameworks - Basics of page layout
and liquid layout. Creation of responsive and flexible page layouts-Usage of containers
and columns to structure content on different devices using Bootstrap 5
Actions and Commands - Exploring patterns- buttons
progress indicators. Bootstrap 5's form components -form controls
